text: We are looking at a small cluttered room.
a kite flying high above in the sky
a bus that is parked next to a coin meter
A woman is laying on a bed with two dogs.
a couple of people that are playing some wii
The same building is shown in the horse and buggy days and today.
A white building with several windows on the corner.
A living room with four chairs, coffee table and TV.
A woman is surfing on a big wave.
An open market full of people and piles of vegetables.
